nasb.text: Shitrai the Sharonite had charge of the cattle which were grazing in Sharon; and Shaphat the son of Adlai had charge of the cattle in the valleys.

esv.text: Over the herds that pastured in Sharon was Shitrai the Sharonite; over the herds in the valleys was Shaphat the son of Adlai.

cnv.text: 管理在沙崙牧放的牛群的，是沙崙人施提賚；管理在山谷的牛群的，是亞第賚的兒子沙法；

ccb.text: 沙仑人施提莱管理沙仑的牛群。亚第莱的儿子沙法管理山谷中的牛群。
